title: Chilli Garlic Prawn Noodles with Teriyaki Veg & Crunchy Peanuts
description: Juicy prawns marinated in chilli and garlic tossed with egg noodles, pak choi, and bell pepper in a teriyaki soy sauce, topped with crushed peanuts.

steps.instruction: Cook noodles in boiling salted water for 4–6 minutes; drain and toss with a little oil.
Slice pepper, chop pak choi, grate garlic, and zest and quarter the lime.
Mix chilli flakes, lime zest, a drizzle of oil, half the garlic, and half the soy sauce; toss prawns to coat.
Fry prawns in a hot pan for 4–6 minutes until pink and opaque; set aside.
Cook pepper and pak choi in the same pan for 4–5 minutes; add remaining garlic for 1 minute.
Add teriyaki sauce, remaining soy sauce, a splash of water, and lime juice; toss in noodles, top with prawns and crushed peanuts.
